Limitation of Liability 10. Termination 11. Governing Law 12. Contact Information ### /privacy (Privacy Policy) Key sections: 1. Information We Collect - Account data (email, name from Google) - Content you create - Usage data 2. How We Use Information 3. Information Sharing (Stripe, Supabase, analytics) 4. Data Retention 5. Your Rights (access, deletion, export) 6. Cookies 7. Children's Privacy 8. Changes to Policy 9. Contact ### /guidelines (Community Guidelines) Key sections: 1. Be Respectful 2. Prohibited Content - Spam - Malware/harmful prompts - Copyright infringement - Hate speech - Personal information 3. Enforcement 4. Reporting 5. "Simple, Transparent Pricing" - Subheadline about value ### Plan Cards Two columns: Free (if applicable) vs Premium **Free Tier** (if we have accounts without payment): - Browse official prompts - Basic search - CLI access (read-only) - "Current Plan" or "Get Started" **Premium - $10/month**: - Everything in Free - Create unlimited prompts - Prompt Packs & Skills - Swap Meet access - Collections - Advanced search & filters - Analytics dashboard - Priority support - "Subscribe Now" CTA ### Feature Comparison Table Detailed grid showing all features by plan. ### FAQ Section - "Can I cancel anytime?" - "What payment methods?" - "Is there a free trial?" - "Team plans?" ### Trust Signals - Secure payment via Stripe - Cancel anytime - 30-day money-back guarantee (if offered) ## Implementation - Static page (can be MDX) - Subscribe button → Stripe Checkout - If logged in + subscribed, show "Manage Subscription" ","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:09.687674143-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T11:02:39.295632124-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T11:02:39.295632124-05:00","close_reason":"Pricing page implemented at /pricing with: Header, Free/Pro plan cards, feature comparison table, FAQ section, and trust signals. Separate from bundles - workflows show HOW to use prompts together in sequence.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:43:57.781450361-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:25.629476986-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:25.629476986-05:00","close_reason":"Implementation complete and verified with type checking","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-axz","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-x21","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:48:17.24763855-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} @@ -145,6 +145,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-be9f","title":"Race condition in saveCredentials - temp file path collision","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-10T21:41:28.299120732-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T21:46:10.195554597-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T21:46:10.195554597-05:00","close_reason":"Fixed: Using random suffix for temp file to prevent race conditions"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-blh3","title":"Fix MCP search_prompts filters without query","description":"serve tool returned no results when query empty but category/tags provided; use prompt list as base","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-10T18:01:55.079748827-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T18:02:31.566733259-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T18:02:31.566733259-05:00","close_reason":"Use prompt list when query empty so category/tag filters work"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-blt","title":"Build CopyButton component with clipboard API","description":"**Details:** - Reusable copy-to-clipboard button - Uses navigator.clipboard.writeText - Visual feedback: icon change + optional toast - Supports multiple variants (primary, ghost, badge) - Optional haptic feedback on mobile **Implementation based on brennerbot:** ```typescript // apps/web/src/components/ui/copy-button.tsx 'use client'; interface CopyButtonProps { text: string; variant?: 'default' | 'ghost' | 'badge'; size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'; label?: string; onCopied?: () => void; } export function CopyButton({ text, variant = 'default', size = 'md', label, onCopied }: CopyButtonProps) { const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false); const handleCopy = async () => { try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text); setCopied(true); // Haptic feedback on mobile if ('vibrate' in navigator) { navigator.vibrate(10); } onCopied?.(); setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000); } catch (error) { console.error('Failed to copy:', error); } }; return ( ); } ``` **Variants:** - default: Primary button style - ghost: No background, icon only - badge: Small inline badge style **Location:** apps/web/src/components/ui/copy-button.tsx **Reasoning:** Copy functionality is core to the product. A well-designed CopyButton with clear feedback creates trust that the action succeeded.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:36.485718304-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:42:50.874869614-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:42:50.874869614-05:00","close_reason":"CopyButton already present from brennerbot; added optional haptic feedback on success","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-blt","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vsk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:14.148183549-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-bojj","title":"CLI: Add skills commands (list/install/export/create)","description":"## Task Add CLI commands for the Skills system so users can discover, install, and export skills from the CLI. ## Commands - `jfp skills list` (filters: --tool, --category, --mine, --search) - `jfp skills install ` (records install; respects tier) - `jfp skills export ` (downloads SKILL.md) - `jfp skills create` (scaffold SKILL.md template; optional upload later) ## Data Flow - Premium APIs: GET /api/skills, GET /api/skills/:id, POST /api/skills/:id/install, GET /api/skills/:id/export - Auth: CLI device code / token auth - Cache: store skill metadata + install state for offline browse ## Logging Requirements - Log endpoint, status, duration for each call - Log install/export actions with skill IDs - Log cache read/write outcomes and version ## Files/Areas - CLI command handlers - CLI config/cache storage - CLI help/docs output ## Cross-Repo Integration - Premium skills epic: jeffreysprompts_premium-492 - Premium skills API: jeffreysprompts_premium-6x3 - Premium skills UI: jeffreysprompts_premium-ik5 - CLI docs: jeffreysprompts.com-t524, jeffreysprompts.com-rd99 - CLI matrix: jeffreysprompts.com-akwo ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:56:22.592534594-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:56:49.516816175-05:00"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-bom","title":"Create prompt permalink pages (/prompts/[id]) -- Details: Full prompt content with syntax highlighting. Copy, install, download buttons. Related prompts (tag overlap + BM25). Changelog accordion. generateStaticParams for SSG. Meta tags for social sharing.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:16.182997281-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:42:56.52642107-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:42:56.52642107-05:00","close_reason":"Created /prompts/[id] pages with full prompt content, variable inputs, copy/install/download buttons, SEO metadata, and SSG.","labels":["status:in_progress"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-bom","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xje","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:54.7061385-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-bom","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cs7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:54.731421428-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-bom","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-02u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:54.75627659-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-bom.1","title":"State change: status → in_progress","description":"Set status to in_progress","status":"closed","priority":4,"issue_type":"event","created_at":"2026-01-10T02:40:00.886840391-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T21:23:23.31817331-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T21:23:23.31817331-05:00","close_reason":"Acknowledged state change - parent bead completed","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-bom.1","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-bom","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-10T02:40:00.888020584-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-c8l","title":"Implement tokenizer (search/tokenize.ts)","description":"**Details:** - `tokenize(text)` splits text into searchable tokens - Lowercase normalization - Punctuation removal (preserve hyphens in compound words) - Stopword filtering (the, a, an, is, are, etc.) - Optional stemming (simple suffix stripping) - Unicode normalization (NFD→NFC) **Implementation:** ```typescript export function tokenize(text: string): string[] { return text .toLowerCase() .normalize('NFD') .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, ' ') .split(/\s+/) .filter(token => token.length > 1 && !STOPWORDS.has(token)); } ``` **Stopwords:** Common English stopwords (50-100 words) **Used By:** BM25 search, synonym expansion **Reasoning:** Consistent tokenization is foundational for search quality. Must be fast (run on every keystroke in SpotlightSearch) and deterministic.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:51.034344375-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:07.171689686-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:07.171689686-05:00","close_reason":"Core package fully implemented with types, registry, bundles, workflows, schema, search (tokenize, synonyms, BM25, engine), export (skills, markdown, json), and template (render, variables)"} @@ -305,7 +306,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rqbs","title":"Unit Tests: CLI Config & Offline Cache","description":"## Task Create unit tests for CLI configuration parsing and offline cache behavior. ## Why This Matters - CLI settings must persist across runs - Offline mode should be predictable and safe ## Test Scenarios 1. Config file read/write roundtrip 2. Invalid config falls back to defaults 3. Project config overrides user config 4. Env var overrides apply correctly 5. Offline cache stores and retrieves prompts 6. Cache eviction respects size limits 7. Cache schema migration retains data ## Logging Requirements - Log config paths and fallback reasons per test case - Record cache hit/miss/eviction stats - Emit structured test logs for failures with full context ## Files to Create - tests/unit/cli/config.test.ts - tests/unit/cli/offline-cache.test.ts ## Success Criteria - Config handling stable - Offline cache deterministic - Failures provide actionable logs ## Origin Moved from `jeffreysprompts_premium-9gvm`. ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.443212341-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.443212341-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rqbs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ctt5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.449063799-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rqbs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.452349312-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rt6z","title":"Task: Export command tests with real temp file output","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:45:02.879245521-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T19:06:51.840994251-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T19:06:51.840994251-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented real temp directory tests in skills.test.ts, registry.test.ts, export.test.ts. Removed all mock.module() usage.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rt6z","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-5mm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:55:27.331919665-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rwq0","title":"Task: E2E test - Touch gestures and bottom sheets","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:48:22.77212535-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T21:02:32.660657608-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T21:02:32.660657608-05:00","close_reason":"Added mobile bottom sheet drag-to-dismiss E2E test","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rwq0","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-945","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:58:16.487995466-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} -{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-s5as","title":"Implement mobile-first responsive design","description":"## Origin Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-shm. Keep both repos in sync. ## Task Implement mobile-first responsive design for all pages. ## Why This Matters From README: "We optimize for an elite UX across desktop and mobile." ## Responsive Breakpoints Using Tailwind's default breakpoints: - `sm`: 640px (large phones) - `md`: 768px (tablets) - `lg`: 1024px (laptops) - `xl`: 1280px (desktops) - `2xl`: 1536px (large desktops) ## Mobile-First Patterns ### 1. Navigation - Hamburger menu on mobile - Slide-out drawer for navigation - Bottom tab bar for primary actions - Collapsible header on scroll ### 2. Content Layout - Single column on mobile - Multi-column grid on desktop - Cards stack vertically on mobile - Touch-friendly spacing (min 44px targets) ### 3. Forms - Full-width inputs on mobile - Stack labels above inputs - Large touch targets for buttons - Keyboard-optimized input types ### 4. Tables - Horizontal scroll with sticky column - Or convert to card layout on mobile - Collapsible rows for detail ### 5. Modals - Full-screen on mobile - Slide-up sheet pattern - Easy dismiss with swipe - Fixed footer for actions ## Component Updates ### Mobile Header ```typescript // src/components/layout/mobile-header.tsx export function MobileHeader() { return (
); } ``` ### Mobile Navigation ```typescript // src/components/layout/mobile-nav.tsx export function MobileNav({ isOpen, onClose }: Props) { return (
{/* Navigation items */}
); } ``` ### Responsive Grid ```typescript
{items.map(item => )}
``` ## Touch Interactions - Swipe gestures for navigation - Pull-to-refresh where appropriate - Long-press for context menus - Haptic feedback (where supported) ## Performance on Mobile - Lazy load images below fold - Reduce initial bundle for mobile - Optimize for slower connections - Respect data saver mode ## Testing Requirements - Test on actual devices (iOS Safari, Android Chrome) - Test in Playwright mobile viewport - Test touch interactions - Test with slow network throttling ## Files to Create - `src/components/layout/mobile-header.tsx` - `src/components/layout/mobile-nav.tsx` - `src/components/layout/mobile-tab-bar.tsx` - `src/components/ui/swipe-sheet.tsx` - `src/hooks/use-mobile.ts` ## Success Criteria - All pages usable on mobile - Touch targets are adequate size - Navigation is intuitive - Performance is acceptable on 3G - No horizontal overflow ","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:35.477171694-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T04:47:47.195600371-05:00"} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-s5as","title":"Implement mobile-first responsive design","description":"## Origin Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-shm. ` ## UX & Visual Requirements - **Free-first:** CTA should be visible but not dominant. - **Desktop:** - Secondary text link: **Login** - Primary button-like link: **Go Pro** (or **Upgrade** if copy fits better) - **Mobile:** - Add both links to the mobile sheet/menu. - **Go Pro** must be visually stronger than **Login**. - **Don’t break layout:** no wrapping or overflow at common widths. ## URL & Routing - Base URL: `https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com` - CTA: `${PRO_URL}/` (Go Pro) - Login: `${PRO_URL}/login` ## Implementation Details 1) **Add a public env var** - `NEXT_PUBLIC_PRO_URL` with default fallback to `https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com`. - Update `apps/web/src/lib/env.ts` (or relevant env schema) to include it. 2) **Centralize URL usage** - In `Nav.tsx`, define: ```ts const PRO_URL = env.NEXT_PUBLIC_PRO_URL ?? "https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com"; const proHref = `${PRO_URL}/`; const loginHref = `${PRO_URL}/login`; ``` 3) **Styling** - Use existing button/link styles in the nav to match the design system. - Prefer shadcn `Button` or existing Tailwind utility classes used in `Nav.tsx`. ## Analytics (Optional but Preferred) If analytics helper exists (e.g., `apps/web/src/lib/analytics.ts`), add events: - `pro_cta_clicked` (button) - `pro_login_clicked` (link) Attach context: `{ placement: "nav", device: "desktop|mobile" }` if available. ## Edge Cases - If `NEXT_PUBLIC_PRO_URL` is missing, default to hardcoded `https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com`. - Ensure external link safety if using `target="_blank"`: include `rel="noopener noreferrer"`. ## Acceptance Criteria - Desktop and mobile nav both show **Go Pro** and **Login**. - Both links route to Pro site endpoints above. - Styles match the current nav and preserve free-first tone. - No layout regression on small screens. - (Optional) Analytics events fire on click.
